title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3.3, Phi-4, Gemma 2, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, published on PyPI as ‘ollama’.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, available on npm as ‘ollama’.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package (PyPI: langchain-ollama) to use Ollama models as LLMs, embeddings, and tool callers.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Open-source ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama (renamed to ‘Open WebUI’).

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama, published to Maven Central.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Community Rust crate providing typed bindings to the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Experimental GitHub Copilot adapter that proxies to a local Ollama model.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling.

title: ollama-chatbot-ui
summary: Minimal React chatbot frontend that talks to Ollama over REST.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Experimental repo demonstrating function-calling support in Ollama models.

title: ollama-embeddings
summary: Official example scripts for generating embeddings with Ollama models.

title: ollama-discord-bot
summary: Python Discord bot that streams Ollama responses into Discord threads.

title: ollama-slack-bot
summary: Slack Bolt app that lets users chat with local Ollama models.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django package adding Ollama LLM backend for django-ai assistants.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rich-terminal CLI for chatting, managing models, and monitoring logs.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: Official n8n community node to integrate Ollama models into workflows.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that brings local LLM completion to note editing.

title: ollama-ray
summary: Ray Serve deployment example for scaling Ollama models across GPUs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in pipelines.
